win_condition: After five phases, perform final scoring; highest VP wins.
tiebreaker: If tied, tied player with most unused workers wins; if still tied, tied player with most goods sold wins, then share victory.

categories.label: Region Completion VP
categories.description: VP scored during play for completing regions, including phase bonuses.

categories.label: Goods Sold VP
categories.description: 1 VP per goods tile sold during play.

categories.label: Yellow Knowledge Tile VP
categories.description: VP from yellow tile effects that grant points.

categories.label: Animal Tile VP
categories.description: VP from animal tiles in estates (including herd bonuses).

categories.label: Building/Ship/Mine/Castle VP
categories.description: VP granted directly by tile effects and end-game bonuses.
